title: ABVMU UP CNET Counselling 2026 + Government Nursing Jobs + Uttar Pradesh + Apply Now
excerpt: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University has released the UP Common Nursing Entrance Test notification 2026. Apply online from 28/03/2026 to 20/05/2026. Check eligibility, age limit, and application fee.
value_prop: _Apply for government nursing jobs in Uttar Pradesh through ABVMU UP CNET Counselling 2026_
secondary_subtitle: _Get admission to B.SC Nursing, Post B.SC Nursing, and M.SC Nursing courses in top universities_

About Organization

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University is a medical university located in Uttar Pradesh, India.
The university offers various medical courses, including nursing programs.

About the Programme

The ABVMU UP CNET Counselling 2026 is a government nursing job opportunity in Uttar Pradesh, India.
The program aims to provide admission to B.SC Nursing, Post B.SC Nursing, and M.SC Nursing courses in top universities.

Eligible Fields / Eligible Applicants

Course NameEligibility
B.SC Nursing 4 Years10+2 Intermediate with PCB Subject and Passed in English Individually from Any Recognized Board. Minimum 45% Marks.
Post B.SC Nursing Course 2 Years10+2 Intermediate Exam from Any Recognized Board in India. GNM Certificate and Registered as State Nurses Registration Council.
M.SC Nursing / Nurse Practitioner in Critical Care NPCC 2 YearsRegistered Nurse and Registered Midwife with Any Nursing Registration Council. B.SC Nursing / Post Basic B.SC Nursing with 55% Marks. 1 Year Work Experience Clinical OR Teaching After Basic B.SC Nursing
